comment: What a delightful discovery this was! My wife and I left a Candlelight Concert nearby looking for something sweet. There was a lot of traffic so I cut down this one street and saw this amazing looking food truck amongst a few others. I pulled into the lot not knowing which one I would goto, but I couldn’t take my eye off Ceviche and Lobster Bars trailer. They also have Crepes and Waffles Bar in the same spot so I felt like this was a perfect choice. Little did I realize I would soon be eating one of the BEST lobster rolls in south Florida! I immediately wanted to get one, so I asked the owner Pau his recommendation. I got a warm lobster roll coated in melted butter with a side of Old Bay mayo and fries. The first bite was insane. The freshness of the lobster and the butter was out of this world. The bread was a perfect compliment to the bite.  I didn’t put the old bay mayo until the last bite or two because I tore the sandwich up but those bites were delicious too. I followed it up with a Dulce leche waffle with caramelized bananas topped with a side of whipped cream. It hit the spot and was a nice compliment to everything. But that lobster roll was something else. Pau was so friendly and welcoming too. I will definitely be back for another one and to see how he’s doing. Do yourself a favor and come eat here. You won’t regret it.

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you so much for sharing your experience with us 🫶
I’m glad you loved the lobster roll and the churro waffle. 
It was a pleasure meeting you both, can’t wait to welcome you back soon :)

comment:
(Translated by Google) We came to try this food truck specializing in ceviche and lobster rolls, and the experience was a resounding success! We sampled several different ceviches as well as a lobster roll, and everything was delicious. It was my first time, and I followed the chef's suggestion for the sauce—a real treat! Admittedly, the wait was a bit long, but it was well worth it. Every bite was flavorful, and we thoroughly enjoyed our meal. It's a shame this food truck isn't in Paris, because I would have gladly gone back!

(Original)
Nous sommes venus découvrir ce food truck spécialisé dans les ceviches et lobster rolls, et l’expérience a été plus que réussie ! Nous avons goûté différents ceviches ainsi qu’un lobster roll, et tout était délicieux. C’était une première pour moi, et j’ai suivi la suggestion du chef pour la sauce – un vrai régal ! Certes, l’attente était un peu longue, mais cela en valait largement la peine. Chaque bouchée était savoureuse, et nous avons vraiment apprécié notre repas. Dommage que ce food truck ne soit pas à Paris, car j’y serais volontiers retourné !

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much guys! It was a pleasure to have you. Enjoy Miami!!🙂

comment:
Acabo de probar Ceviche and Lobster Bar. Cuando llegué, tuve dudas de estacionarme porque era un Food Truck… Wow! Ahora les puedo decir que quedé boquiabierto con el nivel de su comida. Yo probé el Brioche Roll de Fried Fish y me encantó… El chico que nos atendió fue muy amable y nos explicó cada detalle del plato… Yo no soy amante de los food trucks y solo les puedo decir que tienen que venir y probarlo… Todo lo sirven muy lindo y con detalles… Tiene estacionamiento… Y los precios están muy buenos… Los ingredientes que usan son de muy buena calidad… Mis amigos y yo quedamos con ganas de probar todo el menú y estoy seguro que volveremos pronto… Felicitaciones!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I just tried Ceviche and Lobster Bar. When I arrived, I was hesitant to park because it was a food truck… Wow! Now I can tell you I was blown away by the quality of the food. I tried the Fried Fish Brioche Roll and loved it… The guy who served us was very friendly and explained every detail of the dish… I'm not usually a fan of food trucks, but I can only say that you have to come and try it… Everything is beautifully presented with attention to detail… They have parking… And the prices are very reasonable… The ingredients they use are top quality… My friends and I are eager to try everything on the menu, and I'm sure we'll be back soon… Congratulations!!!!

We appreciate your business and also your time, thats why when we realized the uber eats tablet was still open we cancelled the order and the store. It was one of the busiest days of the year, and we sold out all of our seafood.
Bring your assumptions and hate somewhere else Mr Campa, we are a small business that put so much effort into what we do. Your hate really hurt us.
